name: fantasy points query with career_year param and per_game rate type
description: Test case for fantasy points query with career_year param and per_game rate type
expected_query: with "td086ed8a05adf6693c9d5d363c4306a7" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" left join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "player_gamelogs"."pid" and "player_seasonlogs"."year" = "nfl_games"."year" and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = "nfl_games"."seas_type" where "player_gamelogs"."active" = true and "player_seasonlogs"."career_year" between 1 and 3 group by "player_gamelogs"."pid"), "rate_game_e6cff4340e51" as materialized (select CONCAT(nfl_games.year, '_', nfl_games.week, '_', nfl_games.esbid) AS period_key, "nfl_games"."year", "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" group by "role_union"."pid", CONCAT(nfl_games.year, '_', nfl_games.week, '_', nfl_games.esbid), "nfl_games"."year" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0), "tb07a48030b35696397747ee65b6c6595" as materialized (select "fantasy_points_plays"."pid", SUM(fantasy_points_plays.fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "fantasy_points_plays"."seas_type" from (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0) as "fantasy_points_plays" inner join "player_seasonlogs" on "fantasy_points_plays"."pid" = "player_seasonlogs"."pid" and "fantasy_points_plays"."year" = "player_seasonlogs"."year" and "fantasy_points_plays"."seas_type" = "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" where "player_seasonlogs"."career_year" between 1 and 3 group by "fantasy_points_plays"."pid", "fantasy_points_plays"."seas_type") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player"."nfl_draft_year" AS "nfl_draft_year_0", "player"."dpos" AS "dpos_0", "player"."ngs_draft_grade" AS "ngs_draft_grade_0", "player"."ngs_production_score" AS "ngs_production_score_0", "player"."ngs_athleticism_score" AS "ngs_athleticism_score_0", "player"."ngs_size_score" AS "ngs_size_score_0", "player"."height" AS "height_0", CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END AS player_league_roster_status, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_3" AS "top_3_from_careerlogs_0", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_12" AS "top_12_from_careerlogs_0", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_24" AS "top_24_from_careerlogs_0", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_3" AS "top_3_from_careerlogs_1", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_12" AS "top_12_from_careerlogs_1", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_24" AS "top_24_from_careerlogs_1", SUM(rate_game_e6cff4340e51.measure_total) / NULLIF(MAX(td086ed8a05adf6693c9d5d363c4306a7.rate_type_total_count), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "td086ed8a05adf6693c9d5d363c4306a7" on "td086ed8a05adf6693c9d5d363c4306a7"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_game_e6cff4340e51" on "rate_game_e6cff4340e51"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rosters_players" on "rosters_players"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rosters_players"."year" = 2026 and "rosters_players"."week" = 0 and "rosters_players"."lid" = 1 left join "scoring_format_player_careerlogs" as "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044" on "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044.scoring_format_hash = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' left join "tb07a48030b35696397747ee65b6c6595" on "tb07a48030b35696397747ee65b6c6595"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.nfl_draft_year >= '2015' AND player.pos IN ('WR') AND player.height <= '71' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."nfl_draft_year", "player"."dpos", "player"."ngs_draft_grade", "player"."ngs_production_score", "player"."ngs_athleticism_score", "player"."ngs_size_score", "player"."height", rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_3", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_12", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_24", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_3", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_12", "t6a3ea799cf4673fd745d965239ff7044"."top_24", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 17 DESC NULLS LAST, 16 DESC NULLS LAST, 15 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
